When she encounters Jun Che again—this time as a powerless slave—she buys him for revenge. But as they face enemies together, hatred turns to love, and their lives become irrevocably intertwined in a battle for justice and redemption.
cast: He Landou, Deng Xiaoci, Zhong Chenyao, Zhu Liangqi

name: AS - Double Love (2022) (CN)
plot: Lu Wanwan, a rookie in the acting industry and a game player, and Han Jingmo, a strong actor and a game master, who fall in love with each other online and offline and achieve a double success in love and career. In the game, Lu Wanwan due to a slip of fingers, accidentally knocked away the server number one "Mo Bai Zhi Jian." The two become connected because of this and began an interesting game journey. In reality, Lu Wanwan has always admired Han Jingmo's works, but was put down by him in public. In a fit of rage, they turned against each other, and started a battle. The two of them move from the game to reality, reaping the benefits of love while also realizing their dream of acting.
cast: Sophie Zhang, Bi Wenjun, Dai Si, Dylan Kuo, Mao Fangyuan, Li Yuyang, Chun Yu, Xu Qi

name: AS - Fated Hearts (2025) (CN)
plot: After losing her memory in battle, skilled archer Fu Yixiao is taken in by a noble family and unexpectedly reunited with her former enemy, Prince Feng Suige—the man she once struck with an arrow. As they face the dangers of Yujing together, trust replaces suspicion and a deep bond begins to form. Caught in a web of past betrayals and political intrigue, the two must confront their shared history while fighting for survival, freedom, and each other.
cast: Li Qin, Chen Zheyuan, Xia Meng, Chen Heyi, Zuo Ye, Qin Tianyu, Xin Kaili, Zhang Chenglang

name: AS - Eternal Brotherhood (2024) (CN)
plot: In the war-ravaged land of Zichuan, a heroic general and his sworn brothers battle internal rebellion and an invading enemy. As they fight to protect their homeland and loved ones, they forge a powerful tale of loyalty, sacrifice, and the pursuit of peace.
cast: Yang Xuwen, Liu Yuning, Zhang Ming'en, Li Mozhi, Joyin Cai, Ma Shaohua, Huang Haoyue, Li Guo
genre: Action & Adventure / War & Politics / Drama / Sci-Fi & Fantasy

name: AS - Hunting (2025) (CN)
plot: After a large-scale police crackdown, narcotics officer Yang Yipeng seizes a critical lead with captured but defiant ringleader Mou Haidong. Alongside rookie officer Zhi An and informant Duo Zai, Yang follows a trail back to Mou Sen’s new synthetic drug operation, uncovering a complex web of drug networks. But as they delve deeper, the true mastermind remains elusive, hidden behind layers of secrecy
cast: Wang Yang, Tian Hao, Zhang Youhao, Yu Haoming, Deng Enxi, Li Chengru, Benz Hui Siu-Hung, Yang Haoyu

name: AS - City of Light (2025) (HK)
plot: For decades, Kwong Ming Pawn Shop has been renowned for its expertise, with owner Uncle Kin treating orphaned siblings Kwan Ling and Kwan Chun like family. A rift separates them, but years later, as the shop faces financial troubles, the siblings return. Their reappearance brings both challenges and unexpected turns, reshaping their relationships and the shop’s fate.
cast: Tse Kwan-Ho, Edan Lui, Florica Lin, Fish Liew, DeeGor Ho, Will Or, Alan Luk, Adam Pak Tin-Nam

name: AS - Gilded Bond (2025) (CN)
plot: In the Southeast Asian country of Nicara, Sheng Ze—the heir of the Chinese tycoon family conglomerate Shengye Group—returns for the funeral of his younger brother, Sheng An. Convinced that Sheng An was murdered by his personal maid, Qiao Wan, Sheng Ze vows to seize power and take revenge. Meanwhile, Shengye’s current head, Sheng Huaijing, begins to test his nephew, who has returned shrouded in secrets. Was Qiao Wan acting under Sheng Huaijing’s orders when she allegedly killed Sheng An? What was the true cause of Sheng An’s death? Thus begins a ruthless power struggle within the wealthy Sheng family, rife with conspiracy and betrayal, entanglement and confrontation, secrets and desire. Which side will Qiao Wan ultimately choose, and will Sheng Ze succeed in taking control?
cast: Chen Zhengyang, He Zeyuan, Zhang Hanwen, Zhu Shiyu, Cui Changcun, Dou Yikun, Wang Suqing

name: AS - The Lost National Treasure (2025) (CN)
plot: After his mentor Zan Maochang’s death, archaeologist Fang Kun joins an excavation of a newly discovered tomb, where he reunites with his former lover, Luo Qing. Their investigation sparks controversy and draws the attention of artifact criminals. Together with Qi Dacang from the public security bureau, they must confront challenges to protect the tomb and preserve cultural heritage.
cast: Bai Yufan, Xin Baiqing, Wang Herun, Fu Dalong, You Yongzhi, Liu Kai, Ta Ji, Liu Yitong

name: AS - The Best Thing (2025) (CN)
plot: Suffering from insomnia and migraines, Shen Xifan consults a traditional Chinese medicine doctor, He Suye. As their lives intersect, an unexpected romance blossoms.
cast: Zhang Linghe, Xu Ruohan, Caesar Wu, Wang Youjun, Tang Jiuzhou, Huang Cancan

name: AS - The Nest (2023) (CN)
plot: In January 1933, the Japanese army captured Shanhaiguan and occupied Chengde in March. The anti-Japanese situation in North China was in jeopardy. Shanghai's multinational forces are glued and undercurrent. Gu Pan, Tian Qiao Jie and Tan Zhong Wen are agents of Qingshan Military Academy. Gu Pan was alone in completing the assassination of the Japanese Economic Secretary, Koji Koji.
cast: Han Dong, Song Yi, Yao Gang, Wu Hong, Cheng Cheng, Ding Jiawen, 万妮恩, Zhao Yaoke

name: AS - A Love Story of Oiled Paper Umbrella (2024) (CN)
plot: Supreme Court's Nan Fengyi and demon broker Meng Xizhou cross paths through a crime, leading her to apprentice under him as they team up to capture demons. Their growing bond is tested when Meng Xizhou’s inner demon takes control, and Nan Fengyi discovers the demonic core she lost resides within him.
cast: Yu Menglong, Li Zixuan, June Wu, Zhong Lili, He Hua, Feng Lijun

name: AS - City of Romance (2025) (CN)
plot: Bai Xiaoduo, accustomed to protecting herself with lies due to her low self-esteem, meets Su Yancheng, a genius cartoonist who despises dishonesty. Despite their differences, they support each other through a series of events, gradually healing one another's inner wounds.
cast: Yu Chengen, Wang Zixuan, Gao Maotong, Lin Qiyu, Xu Bin, Jane Xiong, Xiao Yuanxi, Feng Yiran

name: AS - Dance of the Sky Empire (2020) (CN)
plot: Set in the Tang era, where humans co-exists alongside demons. A man who is of half-human and half-demon blood named Li Xuan broke the temporal peace of the world. The story follows Li Xuan as he deals with the responsibility of protecting his different bloodlines, as well as his relationship with Su Youling, a spy from the demon tribe and his human lover, Long Wei'er.
cast: Xu Kai, Wu Jiayi, Hani Kezi, Zhou Junchao, Li Junchen, Yu Xintong, Hei Ze, Feng Xueya

name: AS - Iris (2009) (KR)
plot: Two friends, members of the South Korean military, are recruited by a secret black ops agency.
cast: Kim Yeong-cheol, Im Soo-hyang, Lee Joon, Yoon Soy, Baek Sung-hyun, David Lee McInnis, Jang Hyuk, Lee Da-hae

name: AS - Heroes (2020) (CN)
plot:
The Refornment Movement of 1898 resulted in the "Six Heroes" dying. Huo Yuan Jia, who was filled with patriotic enthusiasm, had been eager to participate; however, he fell into the enemy's trap and could only watch as the heroes of the country died. Not long after, China was invaded by the enemy.

A year later, Huo Yuan Jia who was now living in ChangZhou took a stroll along the mountainside. Discouraged by his past and in fear of falling into the enemy's trap again, he decided to move to Shanghai. Huo Yuan Jia's following a reputation grew quickly. The Japanese (who had invaded China) grew worried and began to provoke Huo Yuan Jia. Huo Yuan Jia fearlessly charged into battle and finally defeated the enemy with his courageous actions.
cast: Bingo Zhou, Zhou Yujing Hao, Vincent Zhao Wenzhuo, Mao Linlin, Zhang Yong Gang, Vincent Zheng, Xie Yuchen, Huang Shiliang

name: AS - The Golden Eyes (2019) (CN)
plot: An ordinary man working at a pawnshop accidentally encounters an incident that affects his eyes and ignites changes in his life that start him on a tomb-raiding adventure.
cast: Zhang Yixing, Wang Zixuan, Wang Yuexin, Chen Jiawen, Meng Asai, Hong Xuan, Lee Lichun, Hong Jiantao

name: AS - Arsenal Military Academy
plot:
In 1910s China, nineteen year old Xie Xiang follows in her deceased brother's footsteps and enrolls in military school disguised as a man. She befriends her fellow cadets and and earns the respect of her instructors during the intense training. However, when the unfortunate arrival of the Imperial Japanese troops creates a web of distressing conspiracies, the batch and their allies are forced to prove their courage and resilience.
تدور قصة الدراما حول “شيه شيانغ” التي تنضم إلى الجيش بدلاً من اخيها بالتظاهر بأنها رجل.. أصبحت زميلة في الاكادمية مع الأثرياء “قو يان تشن” و “شين غون شان”. من خلال تدريبهم الصارم ، يشكل الثلاثة رابطا ليصبحوا رفاقا، بينما تحاول شيه شيانغ الحفاظ على تخفيها. بعد العديد من الحوادث ، تحظى شيه شيانغ باحترام زملائها ورؤسائها. أصبحت أيضا موضوعا لعواطف الرجلين في حياتها. يحرك الجيش الياباني المزيد من القوات في المنطقة الشمالية الشرقية مما يتسبب في خوض الأبطال الشباب في المعركة عندما يكتشفون مؤامرة كبيرة.
cast: Bai Lu, Xu Kai, Toby Lee, Wu Jiayi, Wang Yizhe, Hong Yao, Liu Runnan, Gao Yuer

name: AS - Hello, I'm At Your Service
plot:
Due to a misunderstanding between the top-tier customer service representative Dong Dong’en and the client representative Lou Yuan, the mundane workplace life becomes a whirlwind. After starting the job at the client’s office, not only does Dong Dong'en excel in showcasing her top-tier professionality, but she also captures Lou Yuan's heart with her own charm in the battle of wits and courage with the client.
يحكي قصة كيف استحوذت دونغ دونغين، ممثلة خدمة العملاء من الدرجة الأولى، على قلب لو يوان، ممثلة العملاء، بسحرها الخاص في معركة الذكاء والشجاعة
cast: Xu Lu, Miles Wei, Liu Runnan, Zhang Baijia, Guan Zijing, Wang Yitian, Li Jiaming, 刘昊䶮

name: AS - My Lovely Wife
plot:
Xu Nian, who witnessed her mother's death firsthand, developed mutism due to PTSD, losing her mother's care. Her father marries his lover and brings in a stepdaughter of similar age, subjecting Xu Nian to his cold indifference and the mistreatment and bullying of her stepmother, Jiang Wan Li, and her daughter, Xu Yao. However, Xu Nian has always believed that there was a hidden truth behind her mother's death. To uncover the truth, she had to pretend to be weak and innocent, playing the role of a mute girl, while in reality, she is a kind-hearted but highly intelligent woman
شو نيان، التي شهدت وفاة والدتها مباشرة، أصيبت بالصمت بسبب اضطراب ما بعد الصدمة، وفقدت رعاية والدتها. يتزوج والدها من عشيقته وينجب ابنة من نفس العمر، مما يُخضع شو نيان لامبالاته الباردة وسوء معاملة زوجة أبيها جيانغ وانلي وابنتها شو ياو والتنمر عليها
cast: Li Peien, Zheng Nanxi, Hu Yaqi, Wang Lei, Ren Zhong, Zhang Haocheng

name: AS - The Lion's Secret
plot:
The story of the lion and the lazy cat follows two people who get married first before falling in love. Mu WanQing is a successful lady CEO and Liu Qing is an unemployed former soldier. Mu WanQing (Yang ZiShan) and Liu Qing's (Zhu YaWen) first encounter was on their wedding day. With no feelings for each other, their relationship started out hostile until it turns into one of mutual love and support. Liu Qing helps Mu WanQing resolve the crises in her company while at the same time averting the provocations from her ex-boyfriend. As their love is severely tested, a bigger challenge rises to the surface. In order to fulfill the wishes of their elders, they start on journey to Thailand.
قصة الأسد والقط الكسول تتبع شخصين يتزوجان أولاً قبل الوقوع في الحب.
cast: Zhu Yawen, Yang Zishan, Li Yuan, Mike He, Fang Xiaoli, Shi Shi, Li Guangfu, Ding Dang

name: AS - Just Spoil You
plot:
Young and beautiful manhua artist Zhong Ling, in order to treat her son Kele's congenital diabetes, returns to the city she left six years ago due to her breakup with her ex-boyfriend Han Donglai. Unexpectedly, when Kele gets lost, he coincidentally encounters a man who resembles Han Donglai, a character that consistently appears in his mother's manhua. Mistaking him for his father, Kele is taken to Han Donglai's office, leading to their reunion and the beginning of a tumultuous love-hate relationship.
عادت الفنانة الشابة والجميلة "تشونج لينج" ، من أجل علاج مرض السكري الخلقي لابنها "كيلي"، إلى المدينة التي غادرتها منذ ست سنوات "بسبب انفصالها عن صديقها السابق "هان دونجلاي
cast: Wang Haoxuan, Meina Song, Li Yichen, Qin Zimo, Ma Qiu Zi, Liu Hanyu, 马秋元

name: AS - Unchained Love
plot:
During the reign of Long Hua, Xiao Duo, a powerful eunuch in charge of the imperial court, plans a palace mutiny with Prince Fu to help him ascend to the throne. Bu Yinlou, a tribute lady that was supposed to be hanged as a tribute to the late emperor was saved by Xiao Duo as Prince Fu fancies her. The two of them spend a lot of time with each other and develop feelings for each other, but due to their status, they have to hide their feelings. Xiao Duo goes to Jiangnan to supervise a silk trade with a foreign country, and Yinlou accompanies him to visit his relatives in the south, during which they fall in love and finally reveal their hearts. But the road ahead is full of obstacles, Xiao Duo's true identity, the threat of the King of South Court, and the suppression of the emperor in the palace. The two of them have to sacrifice themselves for the greater good and decide to enter the palace, but Xiao Duo misunderstands her. What is the fate between the two?
خلال فترة لونغهوا، خطط الخصي القوي شياو دوا والملك فو لتغيير القصر لمساعدته على الصعود إلى العرش. تم إنقاذ الموهوبة بو ين لو، الذي كانت من المفترض أن تدفن، بواسطة شياو دوا بسبب خيال الإمبراطور، وتم وضعها لاحقا في قصر شياو. ذهب شياو دوا إلى جيانغ نان للإشراف على معاملات الحرير مع الدول الأجنبية، وذهبت ين لو معه جنوبا لزيارة الأقارب. وخلال هذه الفترة، وقع الاثنان في الحب، وكشفا أخيرا عن نواياهما، لكن كان هناك العديد من العقبات أمامهم. الهوية الحقيقية لشياو دوا، تهديد الملك في الجنوب، وقمع الإمبراطور في القصر، خطأ واحد يمكن أن يؤدي إلى الموت. ضحت ين لو بنفسها من أجل الوضع العام وقررت دخول القصر، لكن شياو دوا، الذي ليس متأكدا من الموقف، أساء فهمها. ماذا يمكن أن يكون المصير النهائي بين الاثنين
cast: Dylan Wang, Yukee Chen, Peter Ho, Zeng Li, He Nan, Wang Yuexin, Guan Chang, Han Haotian

name: AS - Mr. Bad
plot:
A young girl, Nan Xing (played by Shen Yue), who loves to write, accidentally summons the villain Xiao Wudi (played by Chen Zhe Yuan) from the novel she wrote when she makes a wish. The clever and cunning Xiao Wudi who just came to this world, threatened Nan Xing to allow him to stay in the apartment next to hers. The then start out on their love-hate relationship and daily lives that one would never find mundane.
تحكي قصة فتاة تُجيد الكتابة، في يومٍ ما عن طريق الخطأ تستدعي الرجل الشرير الموجود في روايتها التاريخية حتى يُمكنه العودة إلى عالمه يجب عليه مساعدتها على إيجاد الحُب الحقيقي.
cast: Chen Zheyuan, Shen Yue, Luo Mingjie, Qu Jingjing, Dong Xuan, Shao Feng, Zijian Wang

name: AS - Skip a Beat
plot:
Qian Jing is a strong and independent woman, who was the only one able to take the position of personal assistant for the demanding CEO, Gu Yi. Soon, their relationship becomes not only professional but also romantic. The problem, however, is that nobody knows the true face of Gu Yi, who after a car accident, from being tender and understanding for a moment, can switch in a few seconds to being cruel and obsessive, especially towards Qian Jing. Soon, Qian Jing not only has to deal with her complicated feelings for her boss, but also her past, especially since her motives for becoming Gu Yi's assistant in the first place are not as noble as they might seem.
قصة غو يي ، "الرجل القوي" المتمرد والرومانسي الذي لا يفهم الحب، وتشياو جينغ، "المرأة ذات الوجهين" التي تبدو ضعيفة ولكنها في الواقع حازمة. تحول الاثنان من الوقوع في الحب وقتل بعضهما البعض إلى الهوس بالقسوة، وهي قصة حب عكسية عالية الطاقة.
cast: He Ruixian, Luo Zheng, Vincent Cao, Guo Jia Nan, Zhu Jintong, Ken Lok Tat-Wah, Xie Chunyi, Yaxi Li

name: AS - Unforgotten Night
plot:
Kim, a 25 year old office worker, has long held unrequited feelings for his beloved senior, Day. In a genuine attempt to forget about Day and move on with his life, Kim decides to give into his inner lust and pursue a one night stand with a random stranger he meets at a bar. But little does Kim know that this stranger is bound to fall for him irreversibly, to the point of no return.
كيم، وهو موظف مكتب يبلغ من العمر 25 عامًا، كان يحمل منذ فترة طويلة مشاعر غير متبادلة تجاه حبيبته الكبرى داي. في محاولة حقيقية لنسيان داي والمضي قدمًا في حياته، قرر كيم الاستسلام لشهوته الداخلية ومتابعة ليلة واحدة مع شخص غريب يلتقي به في حانة. لكن كيم لا يعلم أن هذا الغريب لا بد أن يقع في حبه بشكل لا رجعة فيه، إلى نقطة اللاعودة.
Meanwhile, Kamol, a 36 year old mafia, is a man with special needs in bed who actively switches partners as no one is able to satisfy his desires in its entirety. By a curious twist of fate, Kamol crosses paths with Kim at a bar one night and the two then decide to engage themselves in pure carnal pleasure thereby making Kamol realize that he's finally found the one who's able to perfectly fit his needs. At this point, Kamol decides to make Kim his own and starts pursuing him irrevocably.
cast: Phusanu Wongsavanischakorn, Ton Saran Anantasetthakul, Peat Suchanon Chueluecha, Thapanawat Kaewbumrung, Tong Supanut Sudjinda, Tan Tanchanit Limsilatham, Ku Deachit Daosaengpetch, Areeya Pholphutrakul

name: AS - Rampas Cintaku
plot:
This drama tells the story of a young man named Rizal, who is intelligent but faces many challenges and hardships in life. He and his younger brother were raised by his aunt, Mak Ngah Ila who did not love them. The situation worsened when Mak Ngah Ila was in debt to 'ah long' which disturbed their family. For this reason, Rizal chose the easy way to go to Kuala Lumpur and work in a night club. There, he meets Datin Safieya, a rich businessman who has a dark history with his household.
ريزال ، شاب يريد أن ينجح ولكن عليه أن يدعم أخته رينا وعمته ماك مغاه إيلا. اضطر ريزال للعمل ليل نهار فقط لسداد الديون المقترضة.
cast: Afieq Shazwan, Fasha Sandha, Zarul Husin, Puteri Balqis, Zarynn Min, Ady Mohammad, Erynn Abdullah, Fadilah Mansor

name: AS - Golden House Hidden Love
plot:
Jin Xia, a 27-year-old assistant to a wedding dress designer, took out a loan to buy an old seaside house. She thought her happy life of owning a house would begin, but Jin Xia soon discovered that the house was actually "haunted"! It turns out that there is a young man living in seclusion in the ancient house whose behavior and abilities are like a ghost. This suspected "ghost" boy has no memory and cannot leave the ancient house, and he seems to be inextricably linked to Jin Xia. In order to find the reason for their bond, the two started a blushing and heart-pounding "hidden husband in a golden house" cohabitation life.
حصلت جين شيا، البالغة من العمر 27 عامًا، وهي مساعدة لمصمم فساتين زفاف، على قرض لشراء منزل قديم على شاطئ البحر. اعتقدت أن حياتها السعيدة بامتلاك منزل ستبدأ، لكن جين شيا سرعان ما اكتشفت أن المنزل كان في الواقع "مسكونًا"! اتضح أن هناك شابًا يعيش في عزلة في المنزل العتيق، سلوكه وقدراته تشبه الشبح. هذا الصبي "الشبح" المشتبه به ليس لديه ذاكرة ولا يمكنه مغادرة المنزل القديم، ويبدو أنه مرتبط بشكل لا ينفصم بجين شيا. من أجل العثور على سبب ارتباطهما، بدأ الاثنان حياة تعايش "زوج مخفي في منزل ذهبي" يحمر خجلاً وينبض القلب
cast: 赖美云, Wang Zi Hao, Gu Landi, Peng Biyao, Jackson Jin, Tong Yixuan, Li Wenling, Lee Chih-Hsi

name: AS - Beauty of Resilience
plot:
It tells the magnificent Xianxia story of Wei Zhi, the female protagonist who is reincarnated as a phoenix, and Yan Yue, the male protagonist who is the Sun God. They go through hardships and finally break the destiny of how the "phoenix nirvana will shake the three worlds" and rewrite their own Xianxia story together.
يروي قصة Xianxia الرائعة لـ Wei Zhi ، البطل الأنثوي الذي تم تجسيده كعنقاء ، و Yan Yue ، بطل الرواية الذكر الذي هو إله الشمس. إنهم يمرون بصعوبات وأخيراً يكسرون مصير كيفية "طائر الفينيق نيرفانا سيهز العوالم الثلاثة" ويعيدون كتابة قصة Xianxia الخاصة بهم معًا
cast: Ju Jingyi, Guo Junchen, Liu Dongqin, Lu Tingyu, Ma Yue, Zhang Zhihao, Song Xinran, Nie Zihao

name: AS - Love You Seven Times
plot:
Xiang Yun  was originally a cloud, but was turned into a fairy by Yue Laodian, and started working in Yue Lao Pavilion. Chu Kong is a disciple of the Uri Xingjun constellation. He strayed into Yue Lao Pavilion and was treated as a villain. Chu Kong accidentally broke  Xiang Yun's fan, so the two quarreled and accidentally messed up the red string, which led to the marriage of the three worlds. The Jade Emperor knew about the chaos, and his punishment to them was that they could not go back to heaven until after the seven lives of love, and so their story began.
الدراما مقتبسة من رواية جيولو فيكسيانج الأسطورية "اندفاعة مؤقتة، سيئ الحظ للعالم السابع". يحكي قصة الجنية شيانغ يون، والتلميذ تشو كونغ، الذي أزعج زواج العوالم الثلاثة بسبب سوء فهم، ثم سقوطها من قبل الإمبراطور جايد وتجربة عوالم الحب السبعة. شيانغ يون (تلعب دوره يانغ تشاو يوه)، كانت في الأصل سحابة، ولكن تم تحويلها إلى جنية بواسطة القمر، وأصبحت تعمل في جناح القمر. أما تشو كونغ (يلعب دوره دينغ يو شي)، فهو تلميذ لشيانغ جون، وأصبح يعتبر رجلًا سيئًا لدخوله جناح القمر عن طريق الخطأ، وعندها قام بتحطيم المروحة الخاصة بشيانغ يون، لذلك تشاجر الاثنان. وأفسدوا الحبل الأحمر عن طريق الخطأ، مما تسبب في فوضى الزواج في العوالم الثلاثة، علم الإمبراطور جايد بذلك وعاقبهم ليقضوا سبع فترات من الحب قبل أن يعودوا إلى العالم السماوي، وبدأت القصة من ذلك الحين فصاعدًا.
cast: Yang Chaoyue, Ding Yuxi, Xing Ze, Zhang Xuehan, Charles Lin, Lu Yuxiao, Zhai Xiangyang, Zhang Xiaochen

name: AS - Have a Crush On You
plot:
Lin Yumeng stands up for her friend who has been deceived by her playboy boyfriend. The confrontation escalates from a war of words to a full-blown physical fight.
تدافع Lin Yumeng عن صديقتها التي خدعها صديقها المستهتر. وتتصاعد المواجهة من حرب كلامية إلى قتال جسدي شامل.
cast: Wang Luqing, Jackson Jin, Eva, Yan Junyi, Jiaxi Liu

name: AS - Destined
plot:
Based on Mo Shu Bai's novel of the same name, the story follows Liu Yuru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who suffered from a young age. She is married off to notorious playboy Gu Jiusi, who looks down on her. However, Liu Yuru decides to learn business from Gu's mother and becomes adept at it. She changes her view of Gu Jiusi and discovers his pure and sincere side. Meanwhile, the commander of Yangzhou causes chaos, forcing Gu's family to flee. Gu Jiusi matures and becomes the Minister of Revenue, working to lighten the tax burden on the people. Liu Yuru establishes a women's charity and builds business relationships to bring prosperity to the people. Together, they create a prosperous era.
الدراما مقتبسة من رواية الكاتب مو شو باي، والتي تحمل الاسم نفسه، وهي تحكي قصة ليو يو رو، ابنة تاجر أقمشة في يانغ تشو التي تتعرض للتعذيب منذ أن كانت طفلة، والفتى المحلي غو جيو سى، وكيف تزوجا عن طريق الخطأ
cast: Bai Jingting, Song Yi, Liu Xueyi, Zhang Haowei, Ray Zhang, Zhao Ziqi, Shaogang Zhang, Sha Yi

name: AS - Forever and Ever
plot:
This story is about Shi Yi, a gentle pleasant and low-key but industry's top voice actress, who ran into the elegant returnee chemistry professor Zhousheng Chen at the airport one day. They gradually develop a mutual understanding in getting along with each other, and join hands to preserve traditional craftsmanship and overcome many storms as they decide to accompany each other for the rest of their lives...
لين شين تونغ، الابنة الوحيدة لرجل الأعمال لين قوه فو، وقعت في حب الشاب الفقير تشي شان، على الرغم من معارضة والدها. ومع ذلك، في يوم خطوبتهما، تم تقبيل لين شين تونغ من قبل رجل غامض بقوة. قبل أن تتمكن من التعافي من الصدمة، سقطت لكمة أخرى في أمعائها، توفي والدها بشكل مأساوي في حادث! سعى تشين موه ياو، المتهم بالقاتل، إلى البحث عن لين شين تونغ لإثبات براءته. ولكن قبل أن يتمكن من شرح الموقف، تم إدخاله إلى المؤامرة المحيطة بعائلة لين، والتي أدت إلى علاقة غير عادية ومثيرة بين تشين موه ياو ولين شين تونغ. اكتشفت لين شين تونغ تدريجيًا العلاقة السرية بين خطيبها تشي شان وشيا يوي وي، وفي الوقت نفسه، أساءت إلى فهم تشين موه ياو. مع الحب والكراهية والغيرة التي تعصف بها، قررت تصفية الحسابات. ومع ذلك، لم تدرك أنه كان يحميها بصمت إلا عندما آذت تشين موه ياو.
cast: Ren Jialun, Bai Lu, Ci Sha, Wang Yueyi, Luo Mingjie, Wang Ruixin, Luo Haiqiong, Feng Jiayi

name: AS - Love Is Sweet
plot:
Jiang Jun is a girl who is allergic to tears and has a double degree in economics and psychology. She is unrestrained and idealistic due to her family's superior background. After graduation, she worked in a philanthropy organization where she pursues her dreams. However, her father's sudden accident leaves her in a dilemma. Eventually, she decides to work in a top investment company to fulfill her father's dying wish. In MH, Jiang Jun meets her childhood playmate, Yuan Shuai. However, the current Yuan Shuai is no longer her gentle protector, but her rival. In MH, where the "culture of wolf instinct" is rampant, someone is plotting against Jiang Jun while someone sees her as an eyesore. However with her kind nature and attention to details, along with her high EQ and sense of judgment, Jiang Jun eventually attains success in both her career and love life.
تتحدث دراما “الحب لطيف” عن “جيانغ جون” التي تلتقي بصديق طفولتها المقرب “ما يوان شواي” في مكان العمل. ولكن هذه المرة، ليس كحليف ولكن كمنافس. علاوة على ذلك، يبدو أن هناك شخصًا ما يتآمر ضدها، وعليها الإعتماد على الذكاء والإرادة للنجاح ليس فقط في حياتها المهنية، ولكن أيضًا في الحب. دعونا نرى أي نوع من الحب السخيف ستخلقه بذور الحب السرية المدفونة في أعماق قلوبهم؟
cast: Luo Yunxi, Bai Lu, Gao Hanyu, Xiao Yan, Wang Yilun, Yuanyuan Zhao, Guan Zijing, Hu Xiaoting
director: Yu Zhong Zhong, Wu Jian Xin

name: AS - Road Home
plot:
Lu Yanchen and Gui Xiao were each other's first love but separated after graduation. Years later, they meet again and realize that the sparks are still between them.
“غوي شياو” و “لو يان تشين” يقعان في حب بعضهما في المدرسة ويتم فصلهما بسبب ظروف الحياة، ولكن يحاولان الحفاظ على علاقتهما القوية على مدى سنوات، حتى يلتقيا مرة أخرى بعد سنوات
cast: Jing Boran, Tan Songyun, Zhang Baijia, Li Mincheng, Zhang Qiaoer, Zhang Enshuo, Wang Hao, Liang Tian

name: AS - My Special Girl
plot:
Influenced by his childhood experience, AI engineer Gu Jiuli founded Jiuqian Technology, a company dedicated to the development of escort robots. Hao Liang, a senior preschool education major, likes to sing, but because of her mother’s objection, she can only secretly be a singing live broadcast blogger at night——"Sister Adie". Hao Liang starts as an intern in the Gu Jiuli's company, and fells in love with him at the first sight.
قصة مهندس الذكاء الاصطناعي غو جيو لي وخريجة التعليم ما قبل المدرسة هاو ليانغ، ذات الهويتان المختلفتان، ورحلة نموهما معًا، وتوافقهما، وأخيرا تحقيق أحلامهما معا. أسس مهندس الذكاء الاصطناعي غو جيو لي (يلعب دوره تشانغ يون لونغ) شركة جيو تشيان للتكنولوجيا، وهي شركة مكرسة لتطوير الروبوتات المرافقة؛ أما هاو ليانغ (سونغ يي رن) فتحب الغناء، لكن بسبب أن والدتها لا تدعم موهبتها، وتأمل فقط أن تبحث عن وظيفة مستقرة، لا يسعها إلا أن تعمل كمدونة غنائية في المساء سرا، ومتدربة في شركة جيو لي في الصباح. تحت هویتین مختلفتين، أظهرت هاو ليانغ شخصيات مختلفة، ولكن بسبب شخصية جيو لي المختلفة، ل يدرك أن هاتين الشخصيتين هما في الحقيقة هاو ليانغ، لذلك، حدثت الكثير من الأمور الهزلية.
cast: Leon Zhang, Ireine Song, Zhou Yanchen, Mao Linlin, Zhou Dawei, Li Jiajie, Jing Yanjun, Chen Shuai

name: AS - Detective Chinatown
plot:
Strange crimes occur in Thailand as the ranking for the world's best detective sees a shift. New detectives come into the picture to tackle three difficult cases.
عادت سلسلة من الحالات الغريبة إلى الظهور في الخارج. مع لين مو، تلميذ تانغ رين الكبير، والهاكر العبقري كيكو، والعديد من المحققين والشخصيات الجديدة التي تظهر واحدًا تلو الآخر! في السعي وراء الحقيقة، يجتمع المحققون المخضرم مرة أخرى لإثارة العاصفة في الحي الصيني! تجمع القصة المشوقة بين الأسلوب الفكاهي والمعنى العميق، لتقدم موجة جديدة من الأعمال البوليسية.
cast: Roy Chiu, Zhang Yishang

name: AS - Sword and Fairy 4
plot:
Nineteen years ago, the Qionghua Sect used the double swords of Wangshu and Xihe to trap the demon realm and seize spiritual power, triggering a war between humans and demons, with heavy casualties on both sides. Due to their disagreement with the Qionghua Sect's cultivation philosophy, the disciples of the Qionghua Sect, Yun Tian Qing and Su Yu, left Qionghua and went to Qingluan Peak, where they gave birth to their son Yun Tian He. Not long after, Su Yu passed away.
قبل تسعة عشر عامًا، استخدمت طائفة Qionghua سيوف Wangshu و Xihe المزدوجة لاحتجاز عالم الشياطين والاستيلاء على القوة الروحية، مما أدى إلى اندلاع حرب بين البشر والشياطين، مع خسائر فادحة في كلا الجانبين. بسبب خلافهم مع فلسفة زراعة طائفة تشيونغهوا، غادر تلاميذ طائفة تشيونغهوا، يون تيان تشينغ وسو يو، تشيونغهوا وذهبوا إلى قمة تشينغلوان، حيث أنجبوا ابنهم يون تيان هي. ولم يمض وقت طويل حتى توفي سو يو.
cast: Ju Jingyi, Chen Zheyuan, Mao Xiaohui, Mao Zijun, Wang Duo, Baron Chen, Wang Yuanke, Ai Xiaoqi

name: AS - Marry Me, My Evil Lord
plot:
Mei Shi Qi is a junior Secret Guard in the Secret Guards Department. She is young and frivolous, and her life goal is to gain the respect of her superior, be promoted to a special-grade Secret Guard, earn a million dollars in silver, and find a husband who meets her standards. However, due to her relatively low qualifications, she has not been able to find opportunities to showcase her prowess or meet a husband who meets her requirements and loves her.
مي شي تشي هي حارسة سرية صغيرة في قسم الحرس السري. إنها شابة وتافهة، وهدف حياتها هو كسب احترام رئيسها، والترقية إلى رتبة حرس سري خاص، وكسب مليون دولار من الفضة، والعثور على زوج يلبي معاييرها. ومع ذلك، ونظرًا لمؤهلاتها المنخفضة نسبيًا، لم تتمكن من إيجاد فرص لإظهار براعتها أو مقابلة زوج يلبي متطلباتها ويحبها.
cast: Haodong Ma, Wang Xinting, Su Zhenhua

name: AS - Always on the Move
plot:
In the late 1970s, on the steam train from Ningyang to Hacheng, young conductor Wang Xin diligently performed his duties among the bustling passengers. Mistaking the old railway policeman Ma Kui for a fugitive, they began an unlikely mentor-disciple relationship.
في أواخر السبعينيات، في القطار البخاري من نينغيانغ إلى هاتشنغ، أدى قائد القطار الشاب وانغ شين واجباته بجد بين الركاب الصاخبين. بعد أن ظنوا أن شرطي السكك الحديدية القديم ما كوي هارب، بدأوا علاقة غير متوقعة بين المعلم والتلميذ.
cast: Bai Jingting, Ding Yongdai, Jin Chen, Zuo Xiaoqing, Liu Jun, Jiang Yan, Hu Ke, Ni Dahong

name: AS - Fighting for Love
plot:
A Mai, the daughter of a Nanxia official, is out for blood after her family was killed by her childhood sweetheart Chen Qi. Having grown into a young woman, she disguises herself as a man and wanders the lands to seek revenge. During a chance encounter, A Mai rescues Shang Yizhi, the son of the Crown Princess, and helps him out of many predicaments. Their fates have been intertwined ever since.  When war broke out, A Mai joined the military. She moved up from a foot soldier to a commander due to her marvelous achievements. At the same time, Shang Yizhi has been struggling to survive as he is being hunted down. A Mai assists him in turning the tide. Meanwhile, she also has repeated encounters with the enemy general Chang Yu Qing in the battlefield. Through unexpected events, their paths cross again and they experience life and death together. In the face of the cruelties of the times, A Mai must make a decision for the sake of her country.
ماي، ابنة أحد مسؤولي نانشيا، خرجت للدماء بعد مقتل عائلتها على يد حبيب طفولتها تشين تشي. بعد أن كبرت وأصبحت امرأة شابة، تتنكر في هيئة رجل وتتجول في الأراضي بحثًا عن الانتقام. خلال لقاء صدفة، تنقذ ماي شانغ ييزي، ابن ولي العهد، وتساعده على الخروج من العديد من المآزق. وقد تشابك مصيرهم منذ ذلك الحين. عندما اندلعت الحرب، انضمت ماي إلى الجيش. انتقلت من جندي مشاة إلى قائدة بسبب إنجازاتها الرائعة. في الوقت نفسه، كان Shang Yizhi يكافح من أجل البقاء حيث يتم مطاردته. تساعده ماي في قلب المد. وفي الوقت نفسه، واجهت أيضًا مواجهات متكررة مع جنرال العدو تشانغ يو تشينغ في ساحة المعركة. ومن خلال أحداث غير متوقعة، تتقاطع مساراتهم مرة أخرى ويختبرون الحياة والموت معًا. في مواجهة قسوة العصر، يجب على ماي اتخاذ قرار من أجل بلدها.
cast: Zhang Tian'ai, Zhang Haowei, Wang Ruichang, Yang Tongshu, Johnny Zhang, Sun Shao Long
